abilities.name: Luck Thief
abilities.text: When performing opposed duels against this model, enemy models treat all (+) as if they were (-).

abilities.name: Toxic Family
abilities.text: When this model ends its activation, other allied models within (aura) 8" heal 1.

abilities.name: Unstable
abilities.text: Enemy models within 8" that are dealt damage from hazardous terrain are dealt +1 damage.

actions.name: Horrible Lies and Worse Truths
actions.effects: For each raise this action receives, the target discards a random card.

triggers.name: Interrogate
triggers.text: Target may discard a card. If it does not, this model draws a card.

actions.name: No Shelter Here
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This action may target friendly models.
actions.effects: Move the target up to 4", ignoring models. Then the target gains an Aura (Hazardous) token.

triggers.name: Nothing Sacred
triggers.text: Once per activation. The target must drain a (fortitude), if able. Draw a card.

triggers.name: Mental Trauma
triggers.text: Target must either discard a card or be dealt 3 damage.

actions.name: Anhedonia
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Enemy only. Once per activation. Remove a friendly token from the target.
actions.effects: Summon a Woe minion into base contact with this model or the target.

triggers.name: "What Did I Do..."
triggers.text: The target gains an Aura (Negligent) token.

actions.name: Weight of Despair
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Remove a friendly token from the target.
